Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class SharingSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.SharingSettings
public class SharingSettings extends Metadata

Java class for SharingSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SharingSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="deferGroupMembership" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deferSharingRules" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAccountRoleOptimization" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAssetSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCommunityUserVisibility" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExternalSharingModel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableManagerGroups" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableManualUserRecordSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePartnerSuperUserAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePortalUserCaseSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePortalUserVisibility" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRemoveTMGroupMembership" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRestrictAccessLookupRecords" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSecureGuestAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableShareObjectReportTypes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableStandardReportVisibility" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableTerritoryForecastManager" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
